title: Migrate Drizzle .all()/.run() â†’ portable â€” session core
consumer_purpose: Eliminate all SQLite-only Drizzle .all() and .run() calls from session core files, making them portable for Postgres compatibility
content:
## Plan: Migrate Drizzle .all()/.run() â†’ portable in session core

### Files to modify
1. **packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts** â€” 4 Ă— `.all()` 
2. **packages/opencode/src/session/projectors.ts** â€” 1 Ă— `.all()` + 8 Ă— `.run()`
3. **packages/opencode/src/session/projectors-next.ts** â€” 3 Ă— `.all()` + 6 Ă— `.run()`

### Migration patterns (drizzle-orm v1.0.0-rc.2 portable API)
| SQLite | Portable | Notes |
|--------|----------|-------|
| `db.select().from(t).all()` | `db.select().from(t)` | Remove `.all()`, query builder returns array in portable mode |
| `db.insert(t).values(...).run()` | `db.insert(t).values(...).execute()` | `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` |
| `db.update(t).set(...).where(...).run()` | `db.update(t).set(...).where(...).execute()` | `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` |
| `db.delete(t).where(...).run()` | `db.delete(t).where(...).execute()` | `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` |

### Concrete edits

#### A. session.ts â€” 4 edits (all .all() removals)
A1. Line 602: Remove `.all()` from query builder chain in `children()`
A2. Line 995: Remove `.all()` from query builder chain in `listByProject()`
A3. Line 1042: Remove `.all()` from query builder chain in `listGlobal()` 
A4. Line 1054: Remove `.all()` from query builder chain in `listGlobal()` project fetch

#### B. projectors.ts â€” 9 edits (1 .all() removal + 8 .run() â†’ .execute())
B1. Line 44: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `applyUsage()` (db.update().set().where().run())
B2. Line 103: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `Created` projector (db.insert().values().run())
B3. Line 106: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `Created` projector (db.update().set().where().run())
B4. Line 122: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `Deleted` projector (db.delete().where().run())
B5. Line 138: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `Updated` message projector (db.insert().values().onConflictDoUpdate().run())
B6. Line 150: Remove `.all()` in `Removed` projector (db.select().from().where().all())
B7. Line 156: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `Removed` projector (db.delete().where().run())
B8. Line 170: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `PartRemoved` projector (db.delete().where().run())
B9. Line 187: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `PartUpdated` projector (db.insert().values().onConflictDoUpdate().run())

#### C. projectors-next.ts â€” 9 edits (3 .all() removals + 6 .run() â†’ .execute())
C1. Line 37: Remove `.all()` in `getCurrentAssistant()` (db.select().from().where().orderBy().all())
C2. Line 47: Remove `.all()` in `getCurrentCompaction()` (db.select().from().where().orderBy().all())
C3. Line 57: Remove `.all()` in `getCurrentShell()` (db.select().from().where().orderBy().all())
C4. Line 72: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `updateAssistant()` (db.update().set().where().run())
C5. Line 85: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `updateCompaction()` (db.update().set().where().run())
C6. Line 98: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `updateShell()` (db.update().set().where().run())
C7. Line 112: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `appendMessage()` (db.insert().values().run())
C8. Line 130: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `AgentSwitched` projector (db.update().set().where().run())
C9. Line 140: `.run()` â†’ `.execute()` in `ModelSwitched` projector (db.update().set().where().run())

### Verification
1. Run `bun typecheck` in packages/opencode
2. Confirm 0 new type errors
3. Verify no `.all()` or `.run()` remain on Drizzle objects (confirm with grep)

### Important
- Do NOT touch Effect.run(), sync.run(), pipeline.run() â€” only Drizzle db/tx objects
- Preserve all existing modifications from .get() â†’ .limit(1) migration (dirty files)
- Be additive â€” targeted SEARCH/REPLACE, not whole-file rewrites
